values.name: Never Settle
values.description: Strive for excellence, be 10x, never settle for good enough. Always day 1, always building. Number 1 in everything.
interview_signals: Tell me about a time you pushed beyond what was expected
Describe a situation where you weren't satisfied with the status quo
When did you challenge a decision that others had accepted?

values.name: Dream Team
values.description: All-star players only. Radical honesty, tough coaches, feedback as fuel. Self-identify goals, self-direct, redefine standards.
interview_signals: Tell me about giving/receiving difficult feedback
Describe how you've developed someone on your team

values.name: Think Deeper
values.description: Logic and reason prevail. Start with problem definition. Ask 'Is that true?' and 'Why?' to find root cause. Hands-on managers. Challenge each other.
interview_signals: Walk me through how you approached a complex problem
Tell me about a time you challenged someone's assumption
How do you make technical decisions?

values.name: Get It Done
values.description: Push through, no excuses. Execution champions. Full ownership start to finish. Grit, urgency, no analysis paralysis. Manage risks, have contingency plans.
interview_signals: Tell me about a time you delivered under pressure
Describe a situation where everything was urgent
When did you push through significant obstacles?

values.name: Deliver WOW
values.description: Great products, delight customers. Simple and elegant solutions. Minimum Lovable Products, not MVPs. Internal tools must be sleek too.
interview_signals: Tell me about a product you're proud of
Describe how you obsess over quality
When did you go beyond functional to make something beautiful?

interview_process.style: Direct, fast-paced, values-focused. They probe for specific examples.
what_they_look_for: 10x mindset — not satisfied with good enough
Radical honesty — can give and receive tough feedback
Depth — understands problems at root cause level
Craft — cares about elegance, not just function

recent_news: Building out crypto and trading products
